questionHtml:
Which compound is a waste product of anaerobic respiration in humans?

A. Carbon dioxide

B. Ethanol

C. Lactate

D. Pyruvate

meta.title: Which compound is a waste product of anaerobic respiration in humans? A. Carbon dioxide B. Ethanol C. Lactate D. Pyruvate
